body_preview: - `yyds state why last-failure` timed out at 15s during Day 122 preflight self-test (Assessment §Self-Test Results). - The command reads the full 63K-line `.yoyo/state/events.jsonl` (67.9MB) without any sampling or limit — `build_why_report` scans all events to find a single failure event. - The same read-everything pattern was already fixed in `state doctor
expected_evidence: Task lineage shows file edits in src/commands_state.rs Preflight self-test report shows state why completing within 15s Future trajectory shows one fewer timeout in diagnostic commands Implementation: In `src/commands_state.rs`, find `build_why_report` (around line 15756) and the handler that dispatches to it. When the query is "last-failure" (not a specific
title: Fix yyds state why last-failure timeout — add event sampling cap
